title: DONATIONS - 211info
text: FOOD FOR FAMILIES DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of shelf stable food items such as oils, flour, canned proteins, spices, and shelf stable milk. Also accepts donations of diapers, dog and cat food, personal and feminine hygiene products, canvas grocery bags, quart and gallon resealable plastic bags, disposable gloves, and produce bags. 3505 SE 182nd Avenue Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (971) 220-6679 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 220-6679 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Gresham TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 87. In the high school south parking lot. Food pantry is located within a retired school bus. Services: Animal Food/Supplies Donation Programs Cleaning Product Donation Programs Food Donation Programs Kitchenware Donation Programs Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOLUNTEERING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FOOD FOR FAMILIES
